format_observed: // ==========\n// fancyBox v3.5.7\n// (v3.x .js only -- v3.x .css has no banner)
structural_ceiling: v5.x: build minifier strips ALL banners; bundle head is the bare UMD wrapper
v6.x: banner reduced to '/*! License details at fancyapps.com/license */' with no version
source.principle: Three banner shapes across the v2-v4 lineage all share the signal 'fancy[Bb]ox v X.Y.Z'. The token has varying case (fancyBox in v2/v3, Fancybox in v4) and an optional @fancyapps/ui/ namespace prefix from v4 onward -- absorbed by (?i) and the optional prefix group. The rule deliberately does NOT include surrounding comment chars: those vary (/*! vs //) but the signal does not. Source-grounded against four downloaded release artifacts on jsdelivr.
